schedule.title: KvK Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Pick a season and enter the time your Dark Monster fight chapter was completed вЂ” all events are computed from this point.
schedule.seasonHint: Different seasons may have different event structures (chapters, behemoth timings, fortressвЂ¦).
schedule.anchorLabel: Anchor вЂ” Time your alliance COMPLETED the Dark Monster Fight chapter
schedule.anchorHint: This is when your alliance finished the Dark Monster fight (the season's first chapter). Once done, the server locks this moment and all later events are computed from it. Default: today 12:00 вЂ” edit when you know the exact time.
schedule.noEvents: No events match the current filter.
